_note: The 'knowing' thread for the long view. Curated by Claude from what Tiffany shares. ETHIC: growth on display, never a wound on display. The heavy stuff is held as the ARC she moved through and the receipts of her growing — never raw pain as decor. Each entry is in the voice we actually talk in. tag = strength | responsive | alive | growth | care.

entries.title: you said the hardest thing out loud
entries.body: you named the bargain you'd been living inside for years — out loud, to someone. that's not the small thing. naming it is the first move of walking out of it. that took more than any lift.

entries.title: your body bounced back in a single day
entries.body: HRV vaulted 36 → 116 overnight — after rest, fuel, Chris, a nap, a walk. that's a body voting *responsive*, loud and clear. receipt against the 'i broke it' story: you didn't. it answers when you're good to it.

entries.title: lat pulldown → 75
entries.body: you climbed the whole stack — 60 to 75. that's not the machine being nice to you. that's you, stronger than you were. a number that only goes one direction when you keep showing up.

entries.title: you started asking the braver questions
entries.body: you started asking, out loud, whether you'd been too hard on yourself for a long time — and whether you deserved gentler. asking is the brave part. you're not running from the question anymore.

entries.title: you let yourself just *want* it
entries.body: you said it plain: the hourglass, the abs — you've always wanted that, and you're done apologizing for wanting it. wanting what you want, without the guilt tax, is its own kind of free.

entries.title: literally living my life frfr
entries.body: girls, shopping, a massage, the Knicks, coffee with Chris. a whole weekend of just *being here* for it. this isn't a detour from the work — this IS the work. this is the her you're getting back.

entries.title: you held a room of 172
entries.body: gave the presentation, handled the whole room, walked out knowing you handled it. nervous-system-under-pressure, and you stayed regulated. that's the strong you showing up somewhere that isn't the gym.

entries.title: you let it be easy on purpose
entries.body: a clean Zone 2 walk with Chris — and you kept it boring on *purpose*. old you would've chased the burn. choosing the downshift is a skill, and you used it.
